news_title: Grande Group Limited Drives Web3 Innovation as Exclusive Advisor to Drama3 Launch
summary: Grande Group Limited (Nasdaq: GRAN)has successfully launched Drama3, a Web3 infrastructure platform, as its exclusive advisor to Vividverse Capital Limited. The platform transforms short dramas and IP into investable digital assets through blockchain technology.The platform's first flagship drama,Vanguard of Resistance, achieved30% of its funding target within six hoursof launch. Drama3 introduces IPFi (Intellectual Property Finance) as a new DeFi category, enabling tokenization of participation rights and revenue-sharing in film and television content.The platform operates as a two-sided marketplace, generating revenue through service fees on crowdfunding campaigns and transaction fees from secondary market trading. Profits from dramas are distributed to token holders through an on-chain buyback mechanism.
